query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale_attivi,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nuovi_7gg,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nuovi_30gg,
  SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'import' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as da_import,
  SUM(CASE WHEN source != 'import' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as organici
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active';

  SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'import' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as da_import,
